name: Bistro Cheeseburger
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, combine the sauce ingredients (mayonnaise and Dijon mustard). Set aside.
2. Shape the ground beef into four 3/4-inch thick patties.
3. Lightly brush oil onto the cut sides of the onions.
4. Place the patties and onions on the grill over medium, ash-covered coals.
5. Grill, uncovered, for 13 to 15 minutes or until the centers are no longer pink and the onions are tender. Turn once during grilling.
6. Season the burgers with salt and pepper, if desired, after turning them.
7. Approximately one minute before the burgers are done, top each burger with two slices of cheese.
8. Spread an equal amount of sauce mixture on the top half of each roll.
9. Line the bottom half of each roll with lettuce and tomato; place the cheeseburger and onions on top. Close the sandwiches.
